Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soul Collector]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Soul Collector is someone people can have a link to.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Soul Collector is a being that stepped out from a void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Soul Collector is a character who wanted something to do with a Consultant assassin.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Soul Collector can grant wishes in exchange for following a compass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Soul Collector watched Calder unreadably.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri made a personal connection with the Soul Collector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Kelarac is known as the Soul Collector.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Soul Collector is someone Bliss suspects wanted to catch Kelarac off-guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Soul Collector is ready to spend the last of his collection.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
